dict.string: If you always allow access to your location, you can use services that require it anytime, even if LINE is closed.
To take pictures & scan QR codes
Your data will be used to deliver personalized ads to you.
Workaround for false positive by iTC
LINE requires access to your albums to save photos.
LINE needs access to your local network to improve call quality by directly connecting participants on the same network.
For taking videos, for adding friends using ultrasonic sound waves
LINE needs access to determine your current location
You can use Face ID to unlock LINE and LINE Pay.
If you always allow access to your location, you can use services that require it anytime, even if LINE is closed.
LINE needs access to share and save photos and videos.
